function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, and read nested finance rulebook before using finance records.
function.outcome_justification: An exact search in 50_finance found the target service line in five invoices, but only 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_26__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md falls on or after the start of March 2026. That file shows issued_on 2026-03-26 and line item `follow-up timeline prototype review` with line_eur 240, so total earned since 2026-03-01 is 240.
